title: No error or warning reported when a vector lsb or msb value contains `x` or `z` bits

features.name: bit-select index from division by zero yielding x
features.description: Code should include a vector bit-select where the index expression evaluates to x or z due to division by zero

features.name: ternary expression with x-valued operand from division by zero
features.description: Code should include a ternary expression where the condition uses division by zero yielding x

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
